label: Essential spectrum of ideal MHD with flow consists of Doppler-shifted Alfven and slow continua

provenance.source_span: On the Essential Spectrum of Ideal Magnetohydrodynamics ELIEZER HAMEIRI Courant Institute Dedicated to Harold Grad on the occasion of his sixtieth birthday Abstract The essential spectrum of magnetohydrodynamics (MHD) is s

strengths: Identifies Doppler-shifted continua as central to ideal MHD with flow.
weaknesses: Continuum structure alone does not decide whether the sub-Alfvenic Atlas regime is stable.
